summary: Affiliate System UI Upgrade testing complete. All features verified: KPI strip (Total 40, Active 28, Total Commission, Total Sales), Performance table with Sales/Commission columns, Profile drawer with Profile + Performance sections, Admin sidebar wiring (Catalog & Supply with Vendor Ops + Supply Review, Finance with Commission Engine), and vendor_ops login redirect to /admin.

issues: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - minor, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: AffiliatesPage.jsx correctly implements KPI strip with Total, Active, Total Commission, Total Sales
Performance table has correct columns: Name, Code, Sales, Commission, Status, Actions
Profile drawer opens on row click and shows Profile (email, phone, code, promo, status) + Performance (total_sales, total_commission, paid, pending, rate)
adminNavigation.js correctly defines Catalog & Supply section with Catalog, Vendor Ops, Supply Review, Product Approvals
Finance section correctly includes Commission Engine link
authHelpers.js getDashboardPath() correctly returns /admin for vendor_ops role
LoginPageV2.jsx correctly stores konekt_admin_token for vendor_ops role
context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate UI upgrade complete and verified. 40 affiliates exist with real data. KPI strip shows Total 40, Active 28. Profile drawer works on row click. Sidebar wiring verified for Catalog & Supply (Vendor Ops, Supply Review) and Finance (Commission Engine). vendor_ops login redirect to /admin is now working correctly.
